headline: Devon Energy Provides Updated 2026 Outlook
summary: HOUSTON, June 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Devon Energy Corp. (NYSE: DVN) today provided an updated outlook for the combined company following the recent completion of its transformative merger with Coterra Energy. Supplemental guidance tables for the combined entity are included below and a presentation is available on the company’s website at www.devonenergy.com. headline: Shares of companies in the broader industrial space are trading higher amid overall market strength as stocks rebound following recent weakness. Stocks have been highly volatile following the Fed's recent rate hike.

headline: Stocks Erase Early Gains as Chipmakers Turn Lower
